headline: Oil markets price fragile peace as options signal lingering conflict risk
summary: Investing.com -- The temporary ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, announced last week, triggered a sharp reassessment in oil markets, with options data suggesting investors quickly dialed back, but did not eliminate, geopolitical risk premiums.
